description.p: Suite of tools to match payments and invoices in Abra Flexi using the php-abraflexi library. Can be scheduled via cron or MultiFlexi for automated daily processing.

ul.li: abraflexi-matcher — Matches both received and issued invoices against bank payments.
abraflexi-matcher-in — Matches received (incoming) invoices in AbraFlexi.
abraflexi-matcher-out — Matches issued (outgoing) invoices in AbraFlexi.
abraflexi-matcher-init — Initialises matcher configuration and environment.
abraflexi-matcher-new2old — Matches newer invoices against older outstanding entries.
abraflexi-match-bank — Matches received bank payments to invoices.
abraflexi-match-cash — Matches received cash (till) payments to invoices.
abraflexi-match-received-payment — Matches a specific received payment by its ID.
abraflexi-match-specsym — Matches received payments by specific symbol.
abraflexi-match-varsym — Matches received payments by variable symbol.
abraflexi-pull-bank — Pulls bank statements from AbraFlexi.
abraflexi-transaction-report — Generates a bank transaction report in JSON format.
